message.content:
REWRITE these 3 files to be much simpler and cleaner. The current versions are over-engineered. --- **FILE 1: C:/Users/colby/buy-property-services/assets/buy-property.js** Strip this down to ONLY what's needed: 1. **Scroll Reveal**: IntersectionObserver for `.reveal-on-scroll` elements - adds `.is-visible` class. Handle elements already visible on load. Threshold 0.15. 2. **Header Scroll**: Add `.header--scrolled` class to `.section-header` when scrolled past 100px. Use requestAnimationFrame for performance. 3. **Smooth Scroll**: Smooth scroll for anchor links starting with `#`. That's it. NO card tilt/parallax, NO bottom sheet cart, NO toggle buttons. Keep it under 60 lines total. Vanilla JS, DOMContentLoaded wrapper. --- **FILE 2: C:/Users/colby/buy-property-services/snippets/card-service.liquid** Simple service card snippet accepting: - card_title, card_description, card_price, card_icon, card_link Renders: ```html
{% render 'icon-service', icon_name: card_icon %}

{{ card_title }}

{{ card_description }}

{{ card_price }}

{% if card_link != blank %} Learn More → {% endif %}
``` That's it. Clean, simple. Under 20 lines. --- **FILE 3: C:/Users/colby/buy-property-services/snippets/icon-service.liquid** Keep the same 10 SVG icons (document, house-search, coins, camera, scroll, arrow-up, handshake, megaphone, check-circle, star) but make them simpler: - 32x32 size (not 40x40) - stroke="currentColor", fill="none", stroke-width="1.5" - Clean, minimal line icons - Liquid case statement - Fallback: simple circle icon Write all 3 files with complete, production-ready code.

content.text: Let me read the current files first to understand what exists.

1→{% comment %} 2→ Renders a service card with glassmorphism styling. 3→ 4→ Accepts: 5→ - card_title: {String} Service name (e.g. "RICS Level 2 Survey") 6→ - card_description: {String} Short description of the service 7→ - card_price: {String} Price text (e.g. "From £299") 8→ - card_icon: {String} Icon name to pass to icon-service snippet 9→ - card_link: {String} URL the card links to 10→ - card_color_scheme: {String} Color scheme class (e.g. "scheme-1") 11→ 12→ Usage: 13→ {% render 'card-service', 14→ card_title: 'Auction Legal Pack', 15→ card_description: 'Everything you need for auction.', 16→ card_price: 'From £299', 17→ card_icon: 'document', 18→ card_link: product.url, 19→ card_color_scheme: 'scheme-1' 20→ %} 21→{% endcomment %} 22→ 23→{%- liquid 24→ assign title = card_title | default: 'Service' 25→ assign description = card_description | default: '' 26→ assign price = card_price | default: '' 27→ assign icon = card_icon | default: 'check-circle' 28→ assign link = card_link | default: '#' 29→ assign color_scheme = card_color_scheme | default: 'scheme-1' 30→-%} 31→ 32→ 33→ {%- comment -%} Icon area at top {%- endcomment -%} 34→

content.content: The file C:/Users/colby/buy-property-services/snippets/icon-service.liquid has been updated successfully.

content.text:
All 3 files rewritten. Here is a summary of changes:

**`assets/buy-property.js`** -- Cut from 273 lines to 55 lines.
- Kept: Scroll Reveal (IntersectionObserver, threshold 0.15, `.is-visible` class, handles already-visible elements), Header Scroll (`.header--scrolled` on `.section-header` at 100px, rAF-throttled), Smooth Scroll (delegated click handler for `#` anchor links).
- Removed: toggle buttons, bottom sheet cart, card tilt/parallax. Class changed from `revealed` to `is-visible` as requested.

**`snippets/card-service.liquid`** -- Cut from 65 lines to 12 lines.
- Simple `<div>` card (not a wrapping `<a>` tag anymore). Renders icon, title, description, price, and conditional "Learn More" link. No color scheme logic, no glass-card classes, no inline SVG arrow.

**`snippets/icon-service.liquid`** -- Simplified from 127 lines to ~80 lines.
- Same 10 icons plus fallback. Changed from 40x40 to 32x32 viewBox. Stroke-width changed from 1.8 to 1.5. Removed all the `{% comment %}` blocks. SVG paths slightly simplified where possible. Fallback is a single circle instead of concentric circles.
